title: DNA animation and structure in the series
display_title: DNA animation and structure in the series
wikitext:
[]: DNA animation and structure in the series             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 12:17 am http://darkdiamond.net/wp-content/uploads/2007/08/longinus-evangelion.jpg http://recursos.cnice.mec.es/biosfera/alumno/2bachillerato/genetica/imagenes/horquilla.jpg http://www.biblioteca.org.ar/Libros/hipertextos%20de%20biologia/diagre.gif There are other spiral helix form that I have seen during some scenes also. I'm to tired to think of an explanation for this. I was actually studying when I saw the similarities. There's some stuff about it on google, so people probably already know about this. :( Ok, I drank some coca-cola, here we go. http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1a/Fra_Angelico_027.jpg/180px-Fra_Angelico_027.jpg http://www.kuliniewicz.org/blog/wp-content/uploads/2007/06/lilith-scaled.jpg Seeing that christ was dead, The soldiers did not break his legs. One of the soldiers, However, pierced his side with a spear, And blood and water flowed out, A drop of christ's blood fell upon the soldiers lips. And he wiped it away with his hand. Yet the next day he slept past sunrise, And rouse from his slumber only at night fall And after tasting christ's blood, he thirsted for more. I know. I know because I am that soldier. -The testament of Longinus -http://forum.minitokyo.net/t36683 If the the original spear the pierced Jesus would have still existed it could have been able to clone his ass. In actuality, the "White Moon" of Adam had been discovered near the coast of Antarctica under Mt. Markham, and a Nerv expedition was sent. The expedition then conducted activities to intentionally cause the Second Impact. Adam was fused with human DNA when he was pierced with the Spear of Longinus[22], causing Adam to generate an anti-AT Field. At this point, the Angel's Door of Guf (associated with Adam, as opposed to the human one associated with Lilith and the Black Moon) was opened, and any issuing Angels presumably destroyed[23]. At this point, all life around him for some distance absorbed, Adam reverts to an embryonic form, more manageable from Nerv's perspective.[24] - http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_glossary#cite_note-23 A vid on DNA replication. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=teV62zrm2P0 I think the above image the lance is in chromosome form. http://www2.milwaukee.k12.wi.us/wcll/Navigations/DNAandDisease/chromosome-blow-up.gif Blood seems to be the predominant theme with the lance.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 3:43 am etjusticepourtous wrote: If the the original spear the pierced Jesus would have still existed it could have been able to clone his ass.

[]: Re: DNA animation and structure in the series             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri May 08, 2009 4:09 am Whoa... Eva 00 without armor is pretty hot. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri May 08, 2009 4:16 am A bit mannish though.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri May 08, 2009 5:31 am etjusticepourtous wrote: If the the original spear the pierced Jesus would have still existed it could have been able to clone his ass.

[]: Re: DNA animation and structure in the series             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 5:36 am NemZ wrote: Whoa... Eva 00 without armor is pretty hot. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 08, 2009 5:52 am The cited Wikipedia entry on Second Impact stuff makes my inner Eva geek weep. (Maybe I'll fix it at some point if I'm feeling very brave.)

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 11:18 am The point of this post was to demonstrate how dna replication looks like the spear, and how blood is the main theme surrounding the spear. Ornette wrote: etjusticepourtous wrote: If the the original spear the pierced Jesus would have still existed it could have been able to clone his ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 11:25 am I misunderstood what you were saying. I thought you meant the spear itself could have been cloned, instead of Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 11:31 am Ornette wrote: I misunderstood what you were saying. I thought you meant the spear itself could have been cloned, instead of Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri May 08, 2009 11:54 am etjusticepourtous wrote: Ornette wrote: I misunderstood what you were saying. I thought you meant the spear itself could have been cloned, instead of Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri May 08, 2009 12:01 pm Is there, like, a point to this?

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Fri May 08, 2009 12:10 pm BobBQ wrote: Is there, like, a point to this?

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 1:24 pm Baz wrote: BobBQ wrote: Is there, like, a point to this?

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 1:26 pm etjusticepourtous wrote: Baz wrote: BobBQ wrote: Is there, like, a point to this?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri May 08, 2009 1:35 pm etjusticepourtous wrote: breaking news Jesus is black lol

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 08, 2009 1:38 pm BrikHaus wrote: etjusticepourtous wrote: breaking news Jesus is black lol

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri May 08, 2009 3:22 pm etjusticepourtous wrote: You can't replicate DNA from dead cells, otherwise we would have cloned a wooly mammoth by now.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri May 08, 2009 6:59 pm etjusticepourtous wrote: http://www.therossman.com/evafaqs1/evamovie.html

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Sat May 09, 2009 11:32 pm but evangelion doesn't acknowledge jesus, except in the modern time, which is probably Shinji.
